claims_reviewed.notes: Tied to first-person testimonial from Juan in companion north_lake reel. Not independently corroborated in press, but consistent with broader Baldwin/North Lake release pattern.

summary: 1 claim reviewed: 0 supported, 1 uncertain. Reel is mostly slogans (FOR OUR NEIGHBORS, WE DON'T BACK DOWN) with one date chip. Cleared for render.
